cause_analysis.narrative: Unlimited Beauty Empire churned on 2026-04-13 after 192 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-04-17 via sms — -4 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-23 via sms, client wrote: "Good Morning…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
